VitaFit

A social fitness app built around squad accountability, gamified rewards, and AI-guided training — designed to make every workout feel like a team sport.

UX / UI Designer

Figma
Platform
iOS Mobile App
Scroll
Project Overview

Fitness is better when you do it together

VitaFit is a social fitness platform that combines squad-based accountability, gamified points and rewards, live training sessions, and coach-guided workouts — all in a single, high-energy mobile app.

The design spans the full user journey: onboarding with a personal trainer, daily check-ins, squad formation, community chat, live leaderboards, and a rewards system that keeps users coming back every day.

Motivation

App Personality

Energetic · Competitive · Community-driven

VitaFit speaks like your most motivated gym buddy — high energy, no excuses, always pushing you one rep further.

"If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together."
— VitaFit Squad Motivation
The Challenge

Why do people quit the gym?

😶

No Accountability

Solo fitness relies entirely on self-discipline. Without a community watching, it's easy to skip a session, break a streak, or lose motivation after the first few weeks.

🎮

Lack of Engagement

Most fitness apps are dry dashboards. Users track metrics but feel no excitement. There's no sense of competition, achievement, or belonging that keeps them hooked.

🧭

No Guided Path

Beginners especially don't know where to start. Without a structured plan and expert guidance from day one, they feel lost and give up before seeing any results.

Design Walkthrough

9 screens. One cohesive system.

Every screen is designed for maximum motivation — dark, high-contrast, neon-accented, built to energise.

01 Getting Started
Trainer Onboarding
Welcome screen with 1-week beginner program, meet-your-trainer and Start First Lesson CTA.
Train — Day 1
Daily check-in (Low / Good / Peak), today's drills with form tips, and Start Workout with live progress bar.
Dashboard
Weekly goal tracker, 7-day streak, quick-start session card, and squad leaderboard with reward vouchers.
02 Home & Progress
Home Dashboard
12,450/15,000 pts weekly goal, 14-day streak, rank #04 Top 10, leaderboard & live squad activity feed.
Rewards
Rank #12 in top 5% of squads, weekly goal at 85%, unlocked rewards (Free Guest Pass) and full XP leaderboard.
03 Squads & Community
Iron Vanguard Squad
Elite squad page with head coach Marcus Thorne, exclusive live HIIT session, 6 members & activity feed.
HIIT Warriors Squad
Current squad with 14/20 workout goal, live Power HIIT session countdown, and member activity stream.
Squad Chat — Pilates
Live instructor tips from Coach Sarah, real-time member Q&A, community discussion and shared progress.
Community — Yoga
Daily Flow & Spirit channel with 1.2k active users, pinned Q&A, instructor posts and photo sharing.
Design System

Built for energy, built for focus

Colour Palette

Void
#0D0F14
Card
#1E2538
Neon
#C8F135
Cyan
#00E5CC
White
#F0F4FF
Muted
#7A8099
⚡

Dark + Neon Palette

Near-black backgrounds with electric neon yellow-green (#C8F135) accents create a high-energy aesthetic that instantly communicates intensity and drive — the visual language of performance.

🏆

Gamification First

Points, streaks, XP bars, ranks, leaderboards, and reward unlocks are woven into every screen — making every workout feel like a game where progress is always visible and rewarding.

👥

Squad-Centred Architecture

The app is structured around squads as the primary social unit. Dedicated squad pages, live sessions, shared goals, and real-time activity feeds make accountability feel natural and fun.

🎯

Progress Always Visible

Progress bars, percentage completions, countdown timers, and point trackers appear on every key screen — keeping users laser-focused on their goals and always aware of how close they are.

🧑‍🏫

Coach-Led Onboarding

New users don't face a blank slate — they're immediately matched with a trainer, given a structured beginner program, and introduced to their coach before their first session even begins.

💬

Live Community Chat

Squad chat with instructor tips, pinned Q&As, photo sharing, and real-time community discussions turns each fitness group into a living, breathing team with shared identity and energy.

Outcome

A complete fitness ecosystem

No one finishes a workout wishing they hadn't started. VitaFit makes sure they always start.

VitaFit is a fully designed end-to-end fitness app that tackles the three biggest reasons people quit — lack of accountability, boredom, and no direction. Every screen reinforces community, progress, and competition.

The design system is dark, bold, and energetic — consistent across all 9 screens with a clear component language, typographic hierarchy, and interaction patterns ready for developer handoff.
